title: Electronic Arts Unveils Roadmap for EA SPORTS™ FIFA 23 Esports Ecosystem
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) today announced an enhanced, reimagined EA SPORTS™ FIFA 23 competitive gaming program showcasing the future of football esports. Headlining the ecosystem enhancement is the first-ever EA SPORTS Cup. Players representing the world's top esports organizations and professional football clubs will compete in 2v2 competition through three months of fixtures starting October 17. title: Musqueam Art, Design, and Soccer Culture to Feature in EA SPORTS™ FIFA 23
text: VANCOUVER, British Columbia--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #FIFA23--Today, Musqueam Indian Band and Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) are excited to announce a unique collaboration to feature Musqueam culture in EA SPORTS™ FIFA 23. When the game is released, FIFA 23 players will have the opportunity to play at the Musqueam-inspired VOLTA FOOTBALL Pitch – a fictional representation of Musqueam's real-life soccer field that has brought together Indigenous athletes and fans from across the region since its unveiling in

title: Videogame sales heading for decline in U.S., but one analyst sees a 2023 rebound
text: Videogames are heading for a U.S. sales decline in 2022, but a looming recession and new releases could turbocharge a rebound in 2023, according to one analyst.

title: EA SPORTS™ Defines the Sound of the World's Game With the Official FIFA 23 Soundtrack
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #FIFA23--Today, Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) revealed the official soundtrack of the highly anticipated EA SPORTS™ FIFA 23, sharing the beats and rhythms that will accompany players through the most expansive FIFA to date. Featuring more than 100 songs from an array of artists, the newly minted FIFA 23 soundtrack defies genres, bringing together voices from around the world. title: Apple TV+ character ‘Ted Lasso' comes to EA Sports FIFA 23
text: Jason Sudeikis' character from the hit Apple TV+ series “Ted Lasso” will make an appearance in EA Sports' upcoming video game, FIFA 23. Ted Lasso will be playable as a manager along with the show's fictional football club AFC Richmond.

title: EA SPORTS™ Brings Ted Lasso & AFC Richmond to FIFA 23
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #FIFA23--Today, Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) and Warner Bros. Interactive Entertainment announced the arrival of AFC Richmond to EA SPORTS™ FIFA 23, with fans able to authentically take control of their favorite club across multiple game modes including Career Mode, Kickoff, Online Friendlies, and Online Seasons.
